achievements.emptyDesc: Unlock rare achievements by using the app regularly!
achievements.unlockedDesc:
It seems that new achievements have been unlocked!
You can check them in the achievements section.

app.updateText: Please click the reload button to sync the latest features.

error.boundaryDesc: Try reloading. If it doesn’t help, reset the app data (your progress will be saved as a backup).
error.resetConfirm: Backup your data and reset the app?

filters.noTagsDescription: To create a tag, simply add a hashtag (#) before any word while writing a note.

habits.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive this habit?
habits.emptyArchivedDescription: You can archive a habit by editing it.
habits.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this habit? Deleted data cannot be recovered.
habits.restoreConfirm: Are you sure you want to restore this habit?
habits.sectionColorDescription: Dots mark colors already in use. You can still reuse them.
habits.sectionFrequencyDescription: Times per day you want to repeat this habit.
habits.sectionIconDescription: Faded icons are already in use. You can still reuse them.
habits.sectionOrderDescription: The habit's position in your list.
habits.streakHistoryDesc: Shows streaks of 2 days or more.

menu.dataMgmtDesc: Backup, restore, or clear app data
menu.githubDesc: View or contribute to the project

notes.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this note?
notes.emptyDescription: Add your first note to start tracking your progress and thoughts.

calendar.showDayNumbersDesc: Applies to the default calendar only
calendar.showWeekdayNamesDesc: Applies to the default calendar only

data-management.backupExportConfirm: Download backup file to your device?
data-management.backupExportDesc: Save a backup data to your device
data-management.backupImportDesc: Upload your app data from a backup file
data-management.backupImportSuccess: Data imported successfully! The application will now reload.
clearAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all application data?
data-management.clearAllSuccess: All data has been successfully removed. The application will now reload.
